backgrounds.prompt: A professional and dynamic background for a visa service. A photorealistic, dark blue passport lies open at an angle in the lower-left, showing a page with a shimmering, gold foil visa stamp. A sleek, modern white airplane with gold accents appears to fly out from behind the passport, its wingtip dramatically crossing into the foreground. A large, semi-transparent frosted glass (glassmorphic) panel cuts diagonally across the composition from top-left to bottom-right. The main background is a deep blue (#3b82f6) to white gradient with subtle, ghosted world map patterns. Soft, ambient lighting from the top right highlights the edges of the airplane and passport, giving a premium feel.
A warm, off-white, textured paper background, with subtle imperfections and halftone dot patterns like a retro screen print. The texture is gentle and does not overwhelm the content.
